programme.title: Thirai Thendral
programme.desc: The host interacts with the viewers and plays Tamil movie songs upon request.

programme.title: Sugamana Ragangal
programme.desc: This program features a soothing collection of melodious Tamil songs.

programme.title: Bakthi Paadalgal
programme.desc: This program plays a special collection of devotional songs for a spiritual morning.

programme.title: Aalaya Vazhipaadu
programme.desc: Aalaya Vazhipaadu is a spiritual show that features devotional songs and worships in divine temples on auspicious occasions. It enlightens  the viewers on the history of the sacred shrines around our city, state and across the country.

programme.title: Aanmeega Kadhaigal
programme.desc: This spiritual show features the divine discourse of poet Andal Priyadarshini. Listen to her share and summarize on ancient Tamil literature of Siddhars, the mystic philosophers who had attained spiritual powers.

programme.title: Nalla Kaalam Pirakkuthu
programme.desc: An astrology show to know what the stars have in store for you today. It features the daily astrology predictions based on the 27 nakshatras, pertaining to the 12 zodiac signs.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: This program chronicles the latest events, developments, inventions, discoveries and happenings around the world.

programme.title: Vanakkam Thamizha
programme.desc: It's a morning talk show which hosts celebrities & professionals from all walks of life who share their valuable expertise on varied topics. Enjoy a delightful start to your day with a healthy dose of information and entertainment.

programme.title: Singapenne
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Anandhi takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Ethirneechal
programme.desc: Urged by her father, Janani is always a high achiever. But her marriage into a patriarchal family dashes her dream of a career. Thus begins Janani's arduous journey towards empowering her family's oppressed women to unleash their power.

programme.title: Poongodi
programme.desc: Poongodi rises above her father's male chauvinism, intent on proving herself & pursuing a college education. Her path crosses with Saravanan, a naïve young man who blindly trusts his manipulative stepmother. Uncover the fate of the two kindred souls.

programme.title: Vinodhini
programme.desc: When her husband, a soldier, disappears in a military accident, Vinothini never loses hope, firmly believing he'll come back. Join her inspiring journey as she cares for his family & meets life's hardships as a single mother with resilience & love.

programme.title: Puthu Vasantham
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Selvi longs for the loving embrace & heart-warming bond of a joint family. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds & win over her husband's large family

programme.title: Lakshmi
programme.desc: Maha, her family’s financial backbone, marries Selvam, on condition that she will continue to support her family financially even after marriage. Post which they confront challenges that put the family’s peace and happiness to

programme.title: Iru Malargal
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends—Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi—tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: Aadukalam
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Mouna Geethangal
programme.desc: A woman realises she is pregnant after she divorces her husband for having an affair. Many years later, her husband enters her life, eager to reunite with her.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: This program chronicles the latest events, developments, inventions, discoveries and happenings around the world.

programme.title: Chellame Chellame
programme.desc: Separated at birth, twins Kavin and Nila unknowingly meet at school, setting off truths that force their estranged parents, Vijayalakshmi and Vikram, to confront their forbidden marriage and the painful past that tore their family apart.

programme.title: Annam
programme.desc: Exuding warmth & courage, self-reliant Annam, living with an estranged father and a cruel stepmother, longs for a loving bond to escape her home. Will she find the love she seeks?

programme.title: Kayal
programme.desc: Abandoned by her father & coping with an alcoholic brother, Kayal works as a nurse to become her family's sole provider. She finds happiness in her sacrifice to meet the needs of her brother & sisters. Watch Kayal stand tall in her selfless journey.

programme.title: Marumagal
programme.desc: Aathirai's unyielding passion for helping others constantly lands her in trouble, while Prabhu's self-serving actions show disregard for his own family's well-being. Follow their tumultuous journeys as fate brings them together in marriage.

programme.title: Moondru Mudichu
programme.desc: Nandini is a self-assured girl who puts her family’s happiness above hers. On the other hand Surya hates his mother due to lingering resentments and deliberately bonds with Nandini to cause strife. Watch what destiny has in store for Nandini & Surya.

programme.title: Aalukkoru Asai-New
programme.desc: Arivalagan plans on leading a happy life by marrying an independent educated girl. However, his life turns upside down when his orthodox grandparents force him to marry an illiterate woman.

programme.title: Ambigai Neril Vandhal
programme.desc: After a lot of persuasion, Devaki agrees to marry Ravi. However, the marriage becomes a bitter struggle for her when she comes to know that Ravi is a drunkard and a womaniser.

programme.title: Sangamam
programme.desc: After a few casual confrontations, a classical dancer and a rural folk artist fall in love with each other. However, the girl's father who disregards folk arts opposes their relationship.

programme.title: Manmatha Leelai
programme.desc: Manmatha Leelai is a 1976 Indian Tamil-language romantic comedy film written and directed by K. Balachander.

programme.title: Simmaraasi
programme.desc: A man's campaign against the caste system earns him much respect from the villagers. Years later, his son who has joined the village goon returns from the city with an arrest warrant for his father.

programme.title: Thulli Thirintha Kaalam
programme.desc: Khushboo faces several difficulties when she tries to discipline a group of youngsters who are idlers and always cause huge embarrassment to their families.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Thulli Thirintha Kaalam
programme.desc: Khushboo faces several difficulties when she tries to discipline a group of youngsters who are idlers and always cause huge embarrassment to their families.

programme.title: Sengaathu
programme.desc: Two closely related families fall apart over a member of one family giving witness against a person belonging to the other in a murder trial. Their relationship deteriorates further from there.

programme.title: Senthooram
programme.desc: Muthu, a village chief, adopts Rosa, an orphan, and takes care of her. When Rosa gets married to Kattalai, Muthu tries to cause problems for the couple.

programme.title: Chocolate
programme.desc: Aravind, a college student, falls in love with the newcomer Anjali, unaware that she is the daughter of the commissioner of police and his acquaintance, Jayachandran.

programme.title: Kaadhal Sadugudu
programme.desc: Chitambaram doesn't want his daughter Kausalya to marry Suresh. Suresh then decides not to marry Kausalya without her father's permission. Finally Chitambaram relents and the lovers reunite.

programme.title: Aazhvaar
programme.desc: Aalwar, a young man, loves his mother and sister dearly but fails to protect them from his foes. However, he turns into a ruthless killer, dressing up as Hindu gods, to avenge their murder.

programme.title: Pulival
programme.desc: Kasi, an employee of a supermarket, steals an expensive phone containing explicit videos belonging to a rich businessman Karthik. Hell breaks loose when the videos get uploaded onto the Internet.

programme.title: Sundara Pandiyan
programme.desc: Sundarapandian goes to any length to help his friends. Once, he ends up conveying his friend's feelings to a girl who turns out to be his ex-lover. Rekindled feelings turn their lives upside down.

programme.title: Neerparavai
programme.desc: Despite knowing that her fisherman husband Arulappasamy is dead, Esther continues to go near the beach and pray for his return. Her son and daughter-in-law are perplexed by her strange behaviour.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Neerparavai
programme.desc: Despite knowing that her fisherman husband Arulappasamy is dead, Esther continues to go near the beach and pray for his return. Her son and daughter-in-law are perplexed by her strange behaviour.

programme.title: Sagaa
programme.desc: Sagaa movie is a Tamil feature film starring Sathis and Siva priya.

programme.title: Sattathukku Oru Savaal
programme.desc: Sattathukku Oru Saval Directed by M. Karnan. with Suman, Madhavi.

programme.title: Aalukkoru Asai-New
programme.desc: Arivalagan plans on leading a happy life by marrying an independent educated girl. However, his life turns upside down when his orthodox grandparents force him to marry an illiterate woman.

programme.title: Ambigai Neril Vandhal
programme.desc: After a lot of persuasion, Devaki agrees to marry Ravi. However, the marriage becomes a bitter struggle for her when she comes to know that Ravi is a drunkard and a womaniser.

programme.title: Sangamam
programme.desc: After a few casual confrontations, a classical dancer and a rural folk artist fall in love with each other. However, the girl's father who disregards folk arts opposes their relationship.

programme.title: Manmatha Leelai
programme.desc: Manmatha Leelai is a 1976 Indian Tamil-language romantic comedy film written and directed by K. Balachander.

programme.title: Simmaraasi
programme.desc: A man's campaign against the caste system earns him much respect from the villagers. Years later, his son who has joined the village goon returns from the city with an arrest warrant for his father.

programme.title: Thulli Thirintha Kaalam
programme.desc: Khushboo faces several difficulties when she tries to discipline a group of youngsters who are idlers and always cause huge embarrassment to their families.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Thulli Thirintha Kaalam

programme.title: Sengaathu
programme.desc: Two closely related families fall apart over a member of one family giving witness against a person belonging to the other in a murder trial. Their relationship deteriorates further from there.

programme.title: Senthooram
programme.desc: Muthu, a village chief, adopts Rosa, an orphan, and takes care of her. When Rosa gets married to Kattalai, Muthu tries to cause problems for the couple.

programme.desc: Aravind, a college student, falls in love with the newcomer Anjali, unaware that she is the daughter of the commissioner of police and his acquaintance, Jayachandran.

programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Bhairavi grows up to be a brave girl with abundant love and a divine grace. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal from the family?

programme.title: Kottaga Rekkalochenna
programme.desc: Kaveri's life has been a whirlwind of problems, betrayal & heartbreak until she crosses paths with Arjun. But things take an unexpected turn when Arjun's mother approaches Kaveri to heal the rift with her son. What does the future hold for Kaveri?

programme.title: Sathya
programme.desc: Sathya, who shares a close bond with her sister, values love and compassion above all, while Chamundeswari is driven by wealth and ego. But when fate brings them together, how far will Sathya go to protect her values and her family?

programme.title: Bhairavi

programme.desc: A captivating women's show that actively engages its audience through thoughtfully curated activities, fun games, heartfelt chats, and inspiring stories. Join us for an enjoyable experience that will leave you feeling connected & uplifted.

programme.title: Sri hari Kalyanam
programme.desc: Lakshmi, the pillar of her family, marries Srihari with a promise to continue supporting her loved ones. But their marriage soon faces challenges that test their unity and happiness.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse. While a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Ranga Ranga Pandu ranga
programme.desc: A pure-hearted devotee of Lord Panduranga, Sakhu's unwavering faith & selflessness, draw her closer to the divine but also spark jealousy, leading to poverty, betrayal, & suffering. Yet, her unshaken faith proves the power of devotion, goodness & love.

programme.title: Nenunnanu
programme.desc: Venu helps an eloped couple, Anu and Arun, marry each other. In Arun's absence, Anu starts living with Venu and Arun's father tells him that his wife is having an affair with another man.

programme.title: Bhamalu Satyabhamalu
programme.desc: A captivating women's show that actively engages its audience through thoughtfully curated activities, fun games, heartfelt chats, and inspiring stories. Join us for an enjoyable experience that will leave you feeling connected & uplifted.

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Sivangi
programme.desc: Born into a humble and rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Sivangi takes it upon herself to leave home and fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely confront the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Devi
programme.desc: Devi, a snake goddess, vows to protect the daughter of the man who died while trying to save her from a powerful demon. However, she falls in love with a human, unaware of the consequences.

programme.title: Kottaga Rekkalochenna
programme.desc: Kaveri's life has been a whirlwind of problems, betrayal & heartbreak until she crosses paths with Arjun. But things take an unexpected turn when Arjun's mother approaches Kaveri to heal the rift with her son. What does the future hold for Kaveri?

programme.title: Sathya
programme.desc: Sathya, who shares a close bond with her sister, values love and compassion above all, while Chamundeswari is driven by wealth and ego. But when fate brings them together, how far will Sathya go to protect her values and her family?

programme.title: Bhairavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Bhairavi grows up to be a brave girl with abundant love and a divine grace. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal from the family?

programme.title: Sri hari Kalyanam
programme.desc: Lakshmi, the pillar of her family, marries Srihari with a promise to continue supporting her loved ones. But their marriage soon faces challenges that test their unity and happiness.

programme.desc: Sreenu's classmate invites him and his neighbour, Moksha, to a Valentine's Day party and gets him drunk. Later, his friend tries to rape her but somehow dies a horrendous death.

programme.title: Chattambipaaru
programme.desc: Born into a humble, rustic background burdened by familial & financial struggles, Parvathi takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch as she bravely faces the odds of life with an unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Shambavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Shambhavi grows up to be a brave girl with a heart full of love and a divine blessing. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal?

programme.title: Suryavamsha
programme.desc: Sathyamurthy, the patriarch of Suryavamsha, an affluent village family, is in search of his long-lost grandson, when Karna enters the family under a pretence. Watch Karna unravel untold stories of his life, amid love and feud.

programme.title: Shanti Nivasaa
programme.desc: Warm-hearted & devoted housewife Shanthi has always been looked down upon by her husband & family. But a twist of fate puts Shanthi in a position to take on her nemesis, Manthra, to salvage her marriage and family.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Sindhu Bhairavi
programme.desc: Sindhu loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Vasundhara, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sindhu face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Rathasapthami
programme.desc: Sapthami's selfless nature often leads her into trouble, while Sreemanth's self-serving actions strain his ties with his own family. Their contrasting worlds collide when destiny takes their paths from conflict to togetherness.

programme.title: Mangalyaa
programme.desc: For Mayuri, family always comes first. For Tarak, bitterness towards his mother fuels every step. As their paths cross, love and revenge blur - witness the fate that binds Mayuri & Tarak together.

programme.title: Shambavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Shambhavi grows up to be a brave girl with a heart full of love and a divine blessing. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal?

programme.title: Shanti Nivasaa
programme.desc: Warm-hearted & devoted housewife Shanthi has always been looked down upon by her husband & family. But a twist of fate puts Shanthi in a position to take on her nemesis, Manthra, to salvage her marriage and family.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Sindhu Bhairavi
programme.desc: Sindhu loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Vasundhara, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sindhu face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Movie -Time Bomb
programme.desc: Movie starring by Vishnu Vardhan, Soumya Kulkarni, Puneet Issar and directed by Joe Simon.

programme.title: Sathyadev IPS
programme.desc: Satyadeva, a virtuous policeman, marries the single mother of a girl. After losing his wife, with his step-daughter in tow, he sets out to find the ones responsible for his beloved's death.

programme.title: Upendra Matte Baa
programme.desc: When Prema prays for her dead husband Upendra's help during a family crisis, Upendra's soul is sent back to Earth by Lord Yama in order to fix his son's marital life.

programme.title: Swabhimana
programme.desc: Vijay is a rich man who has no interest in looking after his father's business. He falls in love with Vani, an intelligent woman, who tries to bring about a change in him.

programme.title: Vajrakaya
programme.desc: Viraj, an orphan adopted at a young age, discovers that his mother and grandfather are still alive. Soon, he embarks on a journey to meet his mother, who lives under the tyranny of her father.

programme.title: Nee Nanna Gellare
programme.desc: Srikanth meets Hayavadana Rao at a sports club and forges a friendly and competitive relationship with him in order to get closer to his daughter, Nalini, and woo her.

programme.title: Bhootayyana Maga Ayyu
programme.desc: Following the death of his ruthless landlord father, Ayyu earns the wrath of his villagers. But his biggest enemy is Gulla, who tries to stand against him in order to protect the locals.

programme.title: Nidhi
programme.desc: Movie starring Arjun, Devaraj, Tennis Krishna and is directed by Radhakrishna Bokka.

programme.title: Avane Nanna Ganda
programme.desc: Baloo, a cartoonist, falls in love with Mangala, who aspires to become a doctor. He attempts to express his feelings and win her heart in midst of her pursuance of her dream.

programme.title: Munjane
programme.desc: Manu and Pavithra, without having met, become fond of each other by exchanging notes on a bus travelling to each other's city. Later, Pavithra gets married off to a rich man, unaware that he is Manu.

programme.title: Gowdru
programme.desc: Ramegowda dotes on his sister, Gowri, and will go to any extent to keep her happy. When her jealous husband tries to separate them, things get out of control.

programme.title: Drama
programme.desc: Venkata, a young student, falls in love with his classmate, Nandini. One day, she kisses Venkata and in return asks him to take revenge on the principal for slapping her in front of everyone.

programme.title: Vijaya Dashami
programme.desc: A wealthy kind hearted landlord who is very happy about the return of his son from the oversees. His happiness comes to an end when the hidden truth about his 6 year old daughter who is come down to meet her grand parents is revealed to them

programme.title: Hendithghelthini
programme.desc: Jayaram adopts a child and is excited to surprise his wife by revealing the truth later. However, problems arise when he goes home to find another child, claiming to be his friend's daughter.

programme.title: Rajanna
programme.desc: Rajanna, an orphan who is raised by his uncle, falls in love with Suma, his uncle's daughter. However, things turn awry when Suma meets with an accident.

programme.title: Kass Iddone Boss
programme.desc: A man strongly believes that money is everything in life and will do anything to earn it. Soon he lands in trouble due to negative thinking.

programme.title: Arjuna
programme.desc: Arjuna, a young cop, sets out to avenge the death of his wife who gets killed by influential people. Later, he discovers that his seniors were involved in the crime, which leaves him further enraged.

programme.title: Rishi
programme.desc: Rishi, who hails from a rich family, shows interest in one of the spoilt brats in the college, where he is a trustee. He continues to protect him in spite of opposition.

programme.title: Eetu Ediretu
programme.desc: A brave young man decides to put an end to the evil tricks of a wicked warlock, who has been exploiting innocent people.

programme.title: Sipayi
programme.desc: Sipayi, who fights for the welfare of the people in his village, falls in love with Shanti. When she is forced to marry a criminal, he tries to change her fate.

programme.title: Soundarya
programme.desc: Soundarya film is the upper middle class family story who is an industrialist, his wife and daughter are dragged in the mafia land dealings.But he want to lead a peaceful life.mafia threaten the life.Finally, he involves in a criminal action innocently.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: This is an exclusive game show for women, where contestants can win cash prizes in various exciting games. Each episode's winner is rewarded with a grand cash prize of one lakh rupees. The show aims to help fulfill the dreams of women across Bengal.

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route
programme.desc: Raised by hardship, Rupai grips the bus wheel with defiance. Scarred by betrayal, Rehan dons a nurse’s whites with quiet pride. Two souls’ shared fight for identity stands united in a relentless challenge to society’s gender norms.

programme.title: Sohage Adore
programme.desc: Surya marries his maid, Sohag, ruining his mother’s plans for an affluent match. As tensions rise, Sohag faces hostility from all sides. Surya’s devotion to her lights the way for their journey of love and healing in a broken family.

programme.title: Roopmati
programme.desc: Roopnagar's princess Roopmoti is the jewel of her people. Cast into exile, she finds herself guided by unseen powers & bound to a destiny greater than the crown she lost. Watch her rise to protect her kingdom from the dark forces of evil.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama. Rajasekhar, a rich, influential man and his son Arun, live in a palatial home together with their extended family. Nandini, an Ichchadhaari Nagam”, (shapeshifting snake) awaits to avenge Rajasekhar’s past misdeed and regain the three ‘Kalachakram’ .

programme.title: Shabaas Bhola
programme.desc: With unshakable faith in Mahakal Shiva, little Bhola becomes the fearless defender of Kailashpur against Tantric Bhimani's dark and evil plans.

programme.title: Julali Gaath Ga
programme.desc: Social media influencer Saavi takes a bold stance against injustice & stays true to her values, honoring her grandfather's legacy while battling the ruthless rogue Dhairya. Join Saavi on her journey of love & courage against betrayal & oppression.

programme.desc: Follow the story of poles apart Rudra & Gauri, brought together by destiny & their love for a homeless child, Bitti. Will they unite in love surpassing their odds in family, values & lifestyle?
